description: STM32F103CB — ARM Cortex-M3 32-bit MCU, 128KB Flash, 20KB SRAM, 72MHz, USB, CAN, 2x ADC, 3x USART, 2x SPI, 2x I2C, 37 GPIOs, LQFP48
frequency_range: 0 to 72 MHz (CPU); internal RC 8 MHz / 40 kHz; HSE 4–16 MHz

absolute_max.total_port_current: 150 mA source / 150 mA sink (all I/Os combined)

key_performance.usart: 3× USART (USART1/2/3) with LIN, SmartCard, IrDA, modem control
key_performance.gpio: 37 I/Os on LQFP48, all 5V-tolerant (except analog pins)

pins.name: VBAT
pins.description: Backup domain supply voltage (1.8V to 3.6V). Powers RTC, backup registers, and LSE oscillator when main VDD is off.
pins.requirements: Connect to VDD (3.3V) if no battery backup is needed. Place 100nF decoupling cap to GND.

pins.name: PC13
pins.description: Port C bit 13. Alternate functions: TAMPER-RTC (tamper event input or RTC output). Low-speed I/O: max 2MHz, 3mA output current.
pins.requirements: General GPIO or TAMPER/RTC. Limited drive strength — not for high-speed or high-current use.

pins.name: PC14
pins.description: Port C bit 14. Alternate function: OSC32_IN (32.768 kHz crystal input for RTC). When used as GPIO, limited to 2MHz/3mA.
pins.requirements: Connect 32.768 kHz crystal between PC14 (OSC32_IN) and PC15 (OSC32_OUT) for RTC. Leave unconnected if RTC crystal not used.

pins.name: PC15
pins.description: Port C bit 15. Alternate function: OSC32_OUT (32.768 kHz crystal output for RTC). When used as GPIO, limited to 2MHz/3mA.
pins.requirements: See PC14 (pin 3). Connect other end of 32.768 kHz RTC crystal here.

pins.name: OSC_IN
pins.description: High-speed external (HSE) oscillator input, 4–16 MHz. Can be remapped to PD0 GPIO after HSE bypass. Drives the PLL for 72 MHz CPU clock.
pins.requirements: Connect 8 MHz crystal between OSC_IN and OSC_OUT with load capacitors (~20pF). If using external clock source, drive OSC_IN directly and leave OSC_OUT unconnected.

pins.name: OSC_OUT
pins.description: High-speed external (HSE) oscillator output. Connects to crystal. Can be remapped to PD1 GPIO after HSE enable.
pins.requirements: Connect to other end of 8 MHz crystal. Leave unconnected when using external clock input on OSC_IN.

pins.name: NRST
pins.description: Active-low system reset input/output. Internally filtered (>300ns). Also driven low by internal reset sources (POR, WWDG, IWDG).
pins.requirements: Connect 100nF cap to GND. Optional: 10kΩ pull-up to VDD. Add reset button to GND. Do not leave floating.

pins.name: VSSA
pins.description: Analog ground reference for ADC. Must be at the same potential as VSS.
pins.requirements: Connect to GND plane. Place 1µF + 10nF decoupling between VDDA (pin 9) and VSSA.

pins.name: VDDA
pins.description: Analog supply voltage for ADC, reset, and oscillators. Must be ≥ VDD.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.3V. Decouple with 1µF electrolytic + 10nF ceramic to VSSA. Keep analog supply clean and separate from digital supply in layout.

pins.name: PA0
pins.description: Port A bit 0. Alternate: WKUP (standby wakeup), ADC12_IN0, USART2_CTS, TIM2_CH1_ETR.
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO or analog input (ADC). When used as ADC input, do not drive the pin digitally.

pins.name: PA1
pins.description: Port A bit 1. Alternate: ADC12_IN1, USART2_RTS, TIM2_CH2.
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO or ADC input.

pins.name: PA2
pins.description: Port A bit 2. Alternate: ADC12_IN2, USART2_TX, TIM2_CH3.
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO, ADC, or USART2 TX.

pins.name: PA3
pins.description: Port A bit 3. Alternate: ADC12_IN3, USART2_RX, TIM2_CH4.
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO, ADC, or USART2 RX.

pins.name: PA4
pins.description: Port A bit 4. Alternate: ADC12_IN4, SPI1_NSS, USART2_CK, TIM3_CH2 (remap).
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO, ADC, or SPI1 chip select.

pins.name: PA5
pins.description: Port A bit 5. Alternate: ADC12_IN5, SPI1_SCK.
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO, ADC, or SPI1 clock.

pins.name: PA6
pins.description: Port A bit 6. Alternate: ADC12_IN6, SPI1_MISO, TIM3_CH1, TIM1_BKIN (remap).
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO, ADC, or SPI1 MISO.

pins.name: PA7
pins.description: Port A bit 7. Alternate: ADC12_IN7, SPI1_MOSI, TIM3_CH2, TIM1_CH1N (remap).
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO, ADC, or SPI1 MOSI.

pins.name: PB0
pins.description: Port B bit 0. Alternate: ADC12_IN8, TIM3_CH3, TIM1_CH2N (remap).
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO or ADC input.

pins.name: PB1
pins.description: Port B bit 1. Alternate: ADC12_IN9, TIM3_CH4, TIM1_CH3N (remap).
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO or ADC input.

pins.name: PB2
pins.description: Port B bit 2. Also functions as BOOT1: sampled at reset together with BOOT0 to select boot mode. High = boot from SRAM; Low (with BOOT0 high) = boot from System Memory.
pins.requirements: Tie to GND (or leave with pull-down) for normal operation. BOOT1 is sampled at reset only.

pins.name: PB10
pins.description: Port B bit 10. Alternate: I2C2_SCL, USART3_TX, TIM2_CH3 (remap).
pins.requirements: Add 4.7kΩ pull-up to VDD when used as I2C2 SCL (open-drain).

pins.name: PB11
pins.description: Port B bit 11. Alternate: I2C2_SDA, USART3_RX, TIM2_CH4 (remap).
pins.requirements: Add 4.7kΩ pull-up to VDD when used as I2C2 SDA (open-drain).

pins.name: VSS_1
pins.description: Digital ground (VSS). One of three VSS pins on LQFP48.
pins.requirements: Connect to GND plane. Place 100nF decoupling cap between VDD_1 (pin 24) and VSS_1.

pins.name: VDD_1
pins.description: Digital supply voltage 2.0V–3.6V. One of three VDD pins on LQFP48.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.3V. Decouple with 100nF ceramic cap to GND (VSS_1, pin 23) placed as close as possible to pins.

pins.name: PB12
pins.description: Port B bit 12. Alternate: SPI2_NSS, I2C2_SMBAI, USART3_CK, TIM1_BKIN.
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO or SPI2/I2C2/USART3 alternate function.

pins.name: PB13
pins.description: Port B bit 13. Alternate: SPI2_SCK, USART3_CTS, TIM1_CH1N.
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO or SPI2 clock.

pins.name: PB14
pins.description: Port B bit 14. Alternate: SPI2_MISO, USART3_RTS, TIM1_CH2N.
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO or SPI2 MISO.

pins.name: PB15
pins.description: Port B bit 15. Alternate: SPI2_MOSI, TIM1_CH3N.
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO or SPI2 MOSI.

pins.name: PA8
pins.description: Port A bit 8. Alternate: USART1_CK, TIM1_CH1, MCO (master clock output — can output SYSCLK/HSI/HSE/PLL/2).
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO. When used as MCO, drives clock signal to external devices (external load may require series resistor).

pins.name: PA9
pins.description: Port A bit 9. Alternate: USART1_TX, TIM1_CH2.
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO or USART1 TX. For USB, leave this pin available for USB D+ (PA12) / D- (PA11) — not shared.

pins.name: PA10
pins.description: Port A bit 10. Alternate: USART1_RX, TIM1_CH3.
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO or USART1 RX.

pins.name: PA11
pins.description: Port A bit 11. Alternate: USART1_CTS, CAN_RX, USBDM (USB D− differential line), TIM1_CH4.
pins.requirements: For USB: connect to USB D− with 22Ω series resistor. For CAN: connect to CAN bus transceiver RXD. Cannot be GPIO and USB/CAN simultaneously.

pins.name: PA12
pins.description: Port A bit 12. Alternate: USART1_RTS, CAN_TX, USBDP (USB D+ differential line), TIM1_ETR.
pins.requirements: For USB: connect to USB D+ with 22Ω series resistor; add 1.5kΩ pull-up to 3.3V for full-speed device enumeration. For CAN: connect to CAN transceiver TXD.

pins.name: PA13
pins.description: Port A bit 13. Default after reset: JTMS/SWDIO (SWD debug data I/O). GPIO only available when JTAG/SWD remapped.
pins.requirements: Leave connected to SWD debug header (SWDIO). Do not use as GPIO in production unless debug is disabled.

pins.name: VSS_2
pins.description: Digital ground (VSS). One of three VSS pins on LQFP48.
pins.requirements: Connect to GND plane. Place 100nF decoupling cap between VDD_2 (pin 36) and VSS_2.

pins.name: VDD_2
pins.description: Digital supply voltage 2.0V–3.6V. One of three VDD pins on LQFP48.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.3V. Decouple with 100nF ceramic cap to GND (VSS_2, pin 35).

pins.name: PA14
pins.description: Port A bit 14. Default after reset: JTCK/SWCLK (SWD clock). GPIO only when JTAG/SWD remapped.
pins.requirements: Leave connected to SWD debug header (SWCLK). Do not use as GPIO unless debug is disabled.

pins.name: PA15
pins.description: Port A bit 15. Default after reset: JTDI (JTAG data input). Remap available: TIM2_CH1_ETR, SPI1_NSS.
pins.requirements: Connect to JTAG header TDI pin. If SWD-only debug is used, can be remapped to SPI1_NSS or GPIO.

pins.name: PB3
pins.description: Port B bit 3. Default after reset: JTDO/TRACESWO (JTAG data output / SWO trace). Remap: TIM2_CH2, SPI1_SCK, SPI3_SCK.
pins.requirements: Connect to JTAG header TDO/SWO. Can be remapped to SPI1_SCK or GPIO if JTAG disabled.

pins.name: PB4
pins.description: Port B bit 4. Default after reset: NJTRST (JTAG reset). Remap: TIM3_CH1, SPI1_MISO.
pins.requirements: Connect to JTAG header nTRST. Can be remapped to SPI1_MISO or GPIO.

pins.name: PB5
pins.description: Port B bit 5. Alternate: I2C1_SMBAI, SPI1_MOSI, TIM3_CH2.
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO or SPI1 MOSI (remap).

pins.name: PB6
pins.description: Port B bit 6. Alternate: I2C1_SCL, USART1_TX (remap), TIM4_CH1.
pins.requirements: Add 4.7kΩ pull-up to VDD when used as I2C1 SCL (open-drain).

pins.name: PB7
pins.description: Port B bit 7. Alternate: I2C1_SDA, USART1_RX (remap), TIM4_CH2.
pins.requirements: Add 4.7kΩ pull-up to VDD when used as I2C1 SDA (open-drain).

pins.name: BOOT0
pins.description: Boot mode selection bit 0. Sampled at reset: BOOT0=0 → boot from Flash (normal); BOOT0=1 + BOOT1(PB2)=0 → boot from System Memory (USB DFU/UART bootloader); BOOT0=1 + BOOT1=1 → boot from SRAM.
pins.requirements: Tie to GND via 10kΩ for normal Flash boot. Add a jumper or button to 3.3V for bootloader activation. Do not leave floating.

pins.name: PB8
pins.description: Port B bit 8. Alternate: TIM4_CH3, I2C1_SCL (remap), CAN_RX (remap).
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO or I2C1/TIM4/CAN alternate function.

pins.name: PB9
pins.description: Port B bit 9. Alternate: TIM4_CH4, I2C1_SDA (remap), CAN_TX (remap).
pins.requirements: General-purpose GPIO or I2C1/TIM4/CAN alternate function.

pins.name: VSS_3
pins.description: Digital ground (VSS). One of three VSS pins on LQFP48.
pins.requirements: Connect to GND plane. Place 100nF decoupling cap between VDD_3 (pin 48) and VSS_3.

pins.name: VDD_3
pins.description: Digital supply voltage 2.0V–3.6V. One of three VDD pins on LQFP48.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.3V. Decouple with 100nF ceramic cap to GND (VSS_3, pin 47).

example_application.description: Minimum system circuit for STM32F103CB in LQFP48: 8 MHz crystal oscillator, 3.3V regulated supply, SWD debug header, USB D+/D− with pull-up, BOOT0 pull-down.
example_application.typical_schematic_notes: Decouple every VDD pin individually with 100nF ceramic. VDDA needs additional 1µF bulk cap. BOOT0 to GND for normal boot. NRST filtered with 100nF. SWD header: SWDIO (PA13), SWCLK (PA14), GND, VDD, optional NRST. USB: PA11=D−, PA12=D+ each with 22Ω, D+ 1.5kΩ pull-up enables full-speed enumeration. Crystal: 8MHz between pins 5/6 with 20pF caps to GND.
